name: Name Cleanup DB Migration
outcome_goal: Migration 107 written to rename dag-dispatch, dag-project, dag_research in Praxis.db. Idempotent and safe to re-run.
anti_requirements: Do NOT rename cascade_inactive_to_routes trigger or function — it is legitimate SQL CASCADE terminology
Do NOT drop or recreate any triggers or functions

jobs.label: write_migration_107
jobs.description: Write migration SQL to rename DAG references in Praxis.db
jobs.outcome_goal: Migration file exists at 107_name_cleanup_praxis_branding.sql with idempotent UPDATE statements
jobs.prompt:
Write a new SQL migration file at `Code&DBs/Databases/migrations/workflow/107_name_cleanup_praxis_branding.sql`.

First, read the existing migration 094 (`Code&DBs/Databases/migrations/workflow/094_model_capability_audit.sql`) for the comment and formatting style.

The migration should perform these idempotent updates:

-- 1. Integration registry: rename dag-dispatch to praxis-dispatch
UPDATE integration_registry
SET id = 'praxis-dispatch',
    name = 'Praxis Dispatch',
    description = REPLACE(description, 'DAG', 'Praxis'),
    provider = 'praxis'
WHERE id = 'dag-dispatch';

-- Also update provider for notifications entry
UPDATE integration_registry
SET provider = 'praxis'
WHERE id = 'notifications' AND provider = 'dag';

-- 2. Runtime profile authority: rename dag-project to praxis-project
UPDATE runtime_profile_authority
SET runtime_profile_ref = 'praxis-project'
WHERE runtime_profile_ref = 'dag-project';

-- 3. Model profile candidate bindings: rename dag-project references
UPDATE model_profile_candidate_bindings
SET profile_ref = 'praxis-project'
WHERE profile_ref = 'dag-project';

-- 4. Compilation spine authority: rename dag_research
UPDATE compilation_spine
SET spine_ref = 'praxis_research'
WHERE spine_ref = 'dag_research';

-- 5. Adapter config: rename user-agent
UPDATE adapter_config
SET config_value = 'Praxis-APITaskAdapter/1.0'
WHERE config_value = 'DAG-APITaskAdapter/1.0';

IMPORTANT:
- Each statement MUST use WHERE clauses that only match old values (idempotent)
- Do NOT rename cascade_inactive_to_routes() or trg_cascade_inactive_to_routes
- Do NOT drop or recreate any triggers or functions
- Add clear section comments
- Check which tables actually exist first — if a table doesn't exist, wrap that UPDATE in a DO $$ block with exception handling
- Start with a comment header: -- Migration 107: Rename DAG branding to Praxis

jobs.label: verify_migration
jobs.description: Review migration 107 for correctness and safety
jobs.outcome_goal: Migration is idempotent, does not touch triggers, and covers all rename targets
jobs.prompt:
Read the migration file `Code&DBs/Databases/migrations/workflow/107_name_cleanup_praxis_branding.sql` and verify:

1. It does NOT rename or reference `cascade_inactive_to_routes` or `trg_cascade_inactive_to_routes`
2. Each UPDATE statement is idempotent (safe to run multiple times)
3. It handles the case where old values have already been renamed (WHERE clause won't match)
4. It does NOT drop or recreate any triggers, functions, or tables
5. It covers all five rename targets:
   - integration_registry: dag-dispatch -> praxis-dispatch
   - integration_registry: provider dag -> praxis (for notifications too)
   - runtime_profile_authority: dag-project -> praxis-project
   - compilation_spine: dag_research -> praxis_research
   - adapter_config: DAG-APITaskAdapter -> Praxis-APITaskAdapter

If any issue is found, fix the migration file directly.
